id.description: Stable case id for regression tracking.

module.description: Which subsystem this case primarily grades.

instruction.description: User or system instruction passed into the pipeline.

expected_behavior.description: Human-readable success criteria for authors and LLM judges.

expected_signals.description: Substrings or path hints that should appear in the relevant stage output.

ground_truth.description: Optional structured labels for automated scoring (tool, paths, validation flags).

expect_validation_gain.description: If true, completeness should not decrease without string-level gains (see runner).

expect_state_progress.description: Hints executor to fill state_progress for Tier 4 loop scoring.

post_loop_must_contain.description: Markers that should appear in answer_after but not answer_before (validation_gain).

misleading_signals.description: Distractor paths or claims for Tier 4 failure-driven cases (documentation / eval).

workspace_root.description: Optional repo-relative workspace root for pinned-repo cases.
